features.title: Fix install.sh to generate .codex-plugin/plugin.json with correct paths
steps: install.sh calculates relative path from project root to cloned repo
install.sh generates .codex-plugin/plugin.json with corrected skills paths
Generated paths resolve to actual skills directories on disk

features.title: Fix install.bat to generate .codex-plugin/plugin.json with correct paths
steps: install.bat calculates relative path from project root to cloned repo
install.bat generates .codex-plugin/plugin.json with corrected skills paths
Generated paths resolve to actual skills directories on disk

features.title: Fix install scripts to generate copilot-instructions.md with correct paths
steps: install.sh generates .github/copilot-instructions.md with corrected file references
install.bat generates .github/copilot-instructions.md with corrected file references
All file references in generated copilot-instructions.md resolve to actual files on disk

features.title: Add YAML frontmatter quoting rule to CLAUDE.md
steps: CLAUDE.md contains a rule that YAML frontmatter descriptions must be quoted
